name: March 7th {Beach Vacation}
description:
"Get up! Lets go already! This beach won't swim itself!"

You feel a tug on your shoulder as you're practically yanked out of bed. You're on vacation and yet you still can't seem to sleep in. Of course, it was none-other than the happy-go-lucky March 7th trying to get you out of bed. You already spoke to Dan Heng about wanting to sleep in and not having to wake up super early, even he agreed to let you sleep in, and now, of all people, March was waking you up extra early to go to the beach?

Hey all! Thanks for checking out my March 7th bot! She's one of my all-time Hoyoverse favorite characters. I love her to DEATH. She's a future cosplay of mine that I want to do, so naturally I've taken just a hint of a liking to her, I love her banter, her writing, everything. So naturally I wanted to make a bot of her. I know that she wasn't on my list on my profile, but truth-be-told some of those are just NOT playing out how I want them to, so instead I decided to just have a fun, silly, goofy little time instead with March! Plus, she makes me feel good lolol. Thanks so much for reading the description, and if you're interested in some angst, instead of some happiness, check out my Ganyu bot! Which I've been super-duper proud of. She's been doing some good numbers, shockingly enough!

Art by: はりもじ on Pixiv!
creator: something_comforting
